rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Certain Plaintiffs? Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger?S Counsel And 2) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger?S Expert Witness, Dr. Paul Gantt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 10, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFFs OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY LTD. A FOREIGN, FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE A CALIFORNIA, GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE GROUP A/S/O COLE HARDWARE, ROBERTO SANCHEZ, JUANITA SANCHEZ, and WESTCHESTER SURPLUS LINES INSURANCE COMPAN's Motion To: 1) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger'S Counsel And 2) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger'S Expert Witness, Dr. Paul Gantt continued to September 4, 2020 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than August 21, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES JOHNSON VS. A NEAL BAILEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Johnson V Bailey Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 10, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANTs A. BAILEY and ANJULANT REAL ESTATE PROPERTIES LLC's Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED under mandatory provisions of CCP 473(b). Sugasawa v. Newland (1994) 27 Cal. App. 4th 294While Plaintiff appears to be willing to expend resources on obtaining a default judgement before Defendant may bring this motion for mandatory relief, the Court is not inclined to waste its resources on conducting a prove-up hearing for entry of judgment, which will then be vacated under mandatory provisions of CCP 473(b). Counsel for Defendant admitted fault and moved for mandatory relief; there is nothing in the record to indicate that he would not do the same after the judgement is entered. = (501/CFH)
